curation_notes: The patch adds a MaxValueValidator(1e50) to the NumberFilter class in django_filters/filters.py. Pre-patch, NumberFilter inherited the field property from Filter without any max value validation, allowing exponential notation inputs with huge exponents to cause DoS during integer conversion. Only one non-test source file was changed for the security fix. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — NumericRangeFilter uses RangeField rather than DecimalField and is not affected. Kept pre-assigned class integer-overflow as CWE-681 (Incorrect Conversion between Numeric Types) aligns with the integer conversion DoS pattern.
